Condition Group 1.id: Jika Condition Group 1 = 11, maka Condition Group 3 = 35
Jika Condition Group 1 = 12, maka Condition Group 3 = 36

Condition Group 3.id: 31 : normal semuanya sebetulnya harusnya gini, termasuk BP Employee (default utama)
32 : Intercompany hanya PT yg go live, yg ga go live tetep 31
33 : ini susah, tp hrsnya ada table ECC special customer, ci yeny MDG or data nya CSL (jika belum firm bisa 31 next di CR untuk ubah ke 33)
35 : customer non-KTP yg bill to nya ke RPM
Auto-Mapping Logic: (untuk memudahkan derivasi tambahan yang dapat digunakan di To Be)
Jika Condition Group 1 = 10 (KTP), maka Condition Group 3 = 31. (Sudah info Pak Adi by Gchat)
Jika Condition Group 1 = 11 (Non KTP), maka Condition Group 3 = 35.
Jika Condition Group 1 = 12 (Motorist), maka Condition Group 3 = 36.
Jika Condition Group 1 = 13 (Event), maka Condition Group 3 = 36.
Jika Condition Group 1 = 14 (Vending Machine), maka Condition Group 3 = 35.
Jika Condition Group 1 = 15 (Wingskita), maka Condition Group 3 = 36.
All BP Kecuali untuk BP dibawah :
3rd Party Customer Non KTP & Bp Vending Machine
BP Motorist & BP Canvasser (Condition Group 1 : 12 Motorist)
